# Copilot Instructions for myaotron

## Design Principles
- There is no budget constraint for this project. Do not optimize for cost.
- Choose parts based on **feasibility** (available, well-documented, beginner-friendly) and **safety** (pet-safe, proper voltage ratings, flyback protection).
- Aim to **reduce counter footprint** — prefer compact designs, reuse existing housings, and minimize the number of separate components sitting on the counter.

## Workflow
- Always create a feature branch and open a pull request for changes. Never push directly to main.
- Use descriptive branch names (e.g., `fix-readme-typo`, `add-wifi-support`).
- Include a clear PR description summarizing what changed and why.
